title: Republic Astrogation Survey Team
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Republic Astrogation Survey Team''' was in [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]] a division of the [[Science and Culture Administration]], part of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic's]] [[Galactic Republic General Ministry|bureaucracy]]. It was the name of the Republic's [[Scout/Legends|Scout]] service, which was then exploring the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] and the fringes of the future [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]]. The primary craft of the Team included the [[Vaya-class scout]] and bulkier, deep space explorers.

Scouting missions of the Team typically lasted 3 to 6 months, and returning ships downloaded their data into the Administration's publicly searchable databases on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*"[[Light and Shadow]]" {{Mo}} {{C|canceled}}
